creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text: I think this is a task for re@.  Every time a new minor branch is created, the version number should be bumped.  I think re@ maintains a checklist for new branch creation, either it should include a note to bump the version, or we should simply remove the version number from RELNOTES.  For instance, the version in main should also be updated to say "FreeBSD 15.0".  Either option seems ok to me.
